# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "./scripts/build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "./scripts/test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "./scripts/deploy.sh"
  BUILD_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - echo "Pipeline started for branch $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
    - echo "Commit SHA - $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables from $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE"
        export $(grep -v '^#' "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" | xargs)
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "scripts/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom setup script..."
        chmod +x scripts/setup.sh
        ./scripts/setup.sh
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Starting build stage..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script - $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        $BUILD_SCRIPT
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "Makefile detected, running make build"
        make build
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Gradle project detected"
        ./gradlew build
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Maven project detected"
        mvn package -B
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Node.js project detected"
        npm ci
        npm run build --if-present
      elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Python project detected"
        pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
        python setup.py build 2>/dev/null || true
      else
        echo "No recognized build system found. Please provide a custom build script at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
      - node_modules/
      - "*.jar"
      - "*.war"
      - "*.whl"
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

test:
  stage: test
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Starting test stage..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script - $TEST_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$TEST_SCRIPT"
        $TEST_SCRIPT
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "Makefile detected, running make test"
        make test
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Gradle project detected"
        ./gradlew test
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Maven project detected"
        mvn test -B
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Node.js project detected"
        npm test --if-present
      elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Python project detected"
        python -m pytest 2>/dev/null || python -m unittest discover 2>/dev/null || echo "No tests found"
      else
        echo "No recognized test framework found. Please provide a custom test script at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping tests..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - htmlcov/
    reports:
      junit:
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/junit-*.xml"
        - "**/test-results/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: "**/coverage.xml"
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
  coverage: '/(?:TOTAL|total|Total).*\s(\d+(?:\.\d+)?%)/'
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: $SKIP_TESTS == "true"
      when: never
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Starting deploy stage..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script - $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        $DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Please provide a custom deploy script to enable deployment."
        exit 1
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test
  environment:
    name: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    url: $DEPLOY_URL
  rules:
    - if: $SKIP_DEPLOY == "true"
      when: never
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - when: never

# Optional custom stages that teams can trigger via CI variables
custom-job:
  stage: build
  image: $CUSTOM_JOB_IMAGE
  script:
    - echo "Running custom job defined via CI variables..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing $CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH"
        chmod +x "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH"
        $CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH
      elif [ -n "$CUSTOM_COMMANDS" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom commands..."
        eval "$CUSTOM_COMMANDS"
      else
        echo "No custom script or commands provided."
        exit 1
      fi
  rules:
    - if: $RUN_CUSTOM_JOB == "true"
  allow_failure: true
